allow: PowerShell(if \(-not $?\) { "Directory does not exist or is empty" })
PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\ANDERSON\\tapedido-food"; Start-Job -ScriptBlock { cd "C:\\Users\\ANDERSON\\tapedido-food"; npx vite --host } | Out-Null; Start-Sleep 5; "Dev server starting...")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force; "Killed PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 5173 is free" })
